params.description: Physics and control parameter YAML files (SSOT for simulation/control)

training.description: Training code for IL/RL/VLA policies. Subfolders: il/, rl/, vla/

conventions.naming: snake_case for files, YAML keys, Python vars/functions; PascalCase for classes
conventions.yaml_schema: Each parameter has: value, unit, range, description fields
conventions.import_guard: Heavy dependencies (isaaclab, lerobot, numpy) guarded with try/except
conventions.logging: Use logging module, never print() (Isaac Sim captures stdout)
